title: Vehicle Recognition Research Project
desc: In this research project, I have proposed a novel vehicle recognition system and noise reduction framework based on Transfer Learning and Convolutional Neural Networks. Moreover, I collected an unsupervised dataset of vehicle images, developed various modules and achieved plausible results. Ultimately, I developed an Android application to demonstrate the capability of our approach. This project also resulted in a publication called "Transfer Learning Approach for Classification and Noise Reduction on Noisy Web Data" in the Journal of Expert Systems with Applications.

title: Early research on Deep Depth Colorization
desc: I was one of the contributors to the primary version of this research project under the supervision of Prof. Caputo. In this work, we proposed a novel approach of normalizing and mapping the depth data into a higher dimension in order to improve the performance of visual learning tasks involving the RGB-D images and Convolutional Neural Networks.

title: VANDAL’s dataset preparation
desc: I assisted in the preparation phase of a synthetic depth dataset. This dataset is a large collection of handpicked 3D CAD models and rendered depth images that are used to train Deep Neural Networks. This research project is published in ICRA 2017.

title: Different Companies
desc: I developed a RESTful application for Avasamaneh company, and an Android application for management purposes.

title: Bachelor Training Course
location: ATSYS Electrical/Electronic Manufacturing Company, Tehran, Iran
desc: I developed several modules using Java programming language for the Company’s Content Management System. Furthermore, I assisted in configuring the network’s infrastructure. It was a part of my training course which I passed during my bachelor’s degree.

title: Different Companies
desc: I developed an application for statistical purposes for Pangan Avaran company which was written in C#. In addition, I developed a CMS Android application for a website called Armandownload.
